product: Genie usage guidance and query performance
tagline: Usage guidance addition in Genie: You can now add Usage Guidance to clarify how and when SQL examples should be used.
what_it_does: Usage guidance addition in Genie: You can now add Usage Guidance to clarify how and when SQL examples should be used. Improved query result display in Genie: Query results now show more quickly. It now displays Running query until the query result is ready and Still thinking if additional work is required.
why_it_matters: Improved query result display in Genie: Query results now show more quickly.
key_takeaway: Usage guidance addition in Genie: You can now add Usage Guidance to clarify how and when SQL examples should be used.
